{{Quote|I heard your group has been activated, too, so I thought I'd wish you luck. I joined about the same time you did and it's somehow comforting to know I'm not the only rookie going out today.|Jorgis' e-mail message to Ace Azzameen|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance" />}}
'''Jorgis''' was a fighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as a member of [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Group]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Jorgis was stationed onboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']] after joining the Rebellion about same time as [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]]. The pilot's [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] was [[Green Seven/Legends|Green Seven]]. Jorgis sent an encouraging [[e-mail]] to Azzameen to establish a friendship; however he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] shortly after. Jorgis was honored at a funeral service along with fellow pilots [[Gaad]], [[L'Urak]] and [[Parch]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
